ddls:
CREATE TABLE "abnormalities" (
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abnormality */,
  "abnormality_type" TEXT /* Type of abnormality (e.g., calcification, mass) */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient associated with the abnormality */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image where the abnormality is detected */,
  "breast_density" INTEGER /* Density of the breast tissue */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment made for the abnormality */,
  "abnormality_size" TEXT /* Size of the abnormality */,
  "abnormality_location" TEXT /* Location within the breast */,
  "abnormality_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments by the radiologist */,
  "abnormality_detected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who detected the abnormality */,
  "abnormality_detected_date" TEXT /* Date the abnormality was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abnormality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abnormalities_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abnormalities_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abnormalities_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's medical history */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Summary of the patient's family medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of patient allergies */,
  "current_medications" TEXT /* List of current medications the patient is taking */,
  "last_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the last medical examination */,
  "next_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "cropped_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the cropped image used for analysis */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the original image file */,
  "roi_mask_path" TEXT /* Path to the ROI mask file used in the assessment */,
  "image_view" TEXT /* View orientation of the image (e.g., CC, MLO) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* File format of the image (e.g., DICOM) */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "image_acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the image was acquired */,
  "image_acquisition_device" TEXT /* Device used to acquire the image */,
  "image_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abnormality being assessed */,
  "pathology" TEXT /* Pathology outcome (e.g., benign, malignant) */,
  "mass_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the mass (e.g., round, irregular) */,
  "subtlety" INTEGER /* Subtlety rating of the abnormality */,
  "mass_margins" TEXT /* Margins of the mass (e.g., circumscribed, obscured) */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was made */,
  "assessment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the assessment */,
  "assessment_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "assessment_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the assessment (e.g., 90%) */,
  "assessment_recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for further actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_subtlety FOREIGN KEY ("subtlety") REFERENCES subtleties ("subtlety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_mass_shape FOREIGN KEY ("mass_shape") REFERENCES mass_shapes ("shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_mass_margins FOREIGN KEY ("mass_margins") REFERENCES margins ("margin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_pathology FOREIGN KEY ("pathology") REFERENCES pathologies ("pathology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_abnormality_id FOREIGN KEY ("abnormality_id") REFERENCES abnormalities ("abnormality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathologies" (
  "pathology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathology type */,
  "pathology_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathology (e.g., benign, malignant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pathology */,
  "pathology_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the pathology */,
  "pathology_treatment" TEXT /* Recommended treatment for the pathology */,
  "pathology_prognosis" TEXT /* Prognosis for the pathology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mass_shapes" (
  "shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shape type */,
  "shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the mass shape */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mass shape */,
  "shape_characteristics" TEXT /* Additional characteristics of the mass shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subtleties" (
  "subtlety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for subtlety rating */,
  "subtlety_rating" TEXT /* Rating value indicating subtlety (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subtlety level */,
  "subtlety_characteristics" TEXT /* Additional characteristics of the subtlety level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtlety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "margins" (
  "margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each margin type */,
  "margin_type" TEXT /* Type of margin (e.g., circumscribed, spiculated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the margin type */,
  "margin_characteristics" TEXT /* Additional characteristics of the margin type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("margin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view type */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of image view (e.g., CC, MLO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view */,
  "view_characteristics" TEXT /* Additional characteristics of the view type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding image */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  "file_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image file */,
  "file_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roi_masks" (
  "mask_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ROI mask */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated image */,
  "mask_path" TEXT /* File path to the ROI mask */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mask */,
  "mask_size" TEXT /* Size of the ROI mask file */,
  "mask_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the ROI mask */,
  "mask_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the ROI mask */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mask_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "abnormality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abnormality being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the user's browser */,
  "log_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_abnormality_id FOREIGN KEY ("abnormality_id") REFERENCES abnormalities ("abnormality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
